2025-26 Long Beach State Beach Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 10-22 (6-14, 9th in Big West MBB)

Coach: Chris Acker

PS/G: 74.9 (205th of 365)

PA/G: 77.8 (288th of 365)

SRS: -5.83 (231st of 365)

SOS: -0.07 (139th of 365)

ORtg: 103.8 (302nd of 365)

DRtg: 107.8 (213th of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +200000
